channel.title: NICAR 2026 Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Bluesky posts about the NICAR 2026 conference (#NICAR26, #NICAR2026)

item.title: News Media Help Desk (@newsmediahelpdesk.org)
item.description: At this year’s NICAR conference, dozens of data journalists shared their favorite digital tools that are helping — and in some cases transforming — their journalism. We reposted @gijn.org's list, showcasing many of the tools 🧰🛠️

item.title: Leon Yin (@leonyin.org)
item.description: Tips to investigate right-wing influencers from @gijn.org. Many points from a recent NICAR talk of 3 recent Bloomberg investigations. gijn.org/stories/tips...

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: Exactly this. Even more this year. I don't need to hear from an opinion columnist whose whole schtick is contrarian click-bait headlines. I'd rather learn from real working journalists doing interesting things. You can search the #genai tag in my roundup of #NICAR resources www.machlis.com/nicar/

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: I doubt Yglesias knows how and how much AI is already being used in the average newsroom. He did an experiment on using it in local journalism! Even though he's not working in a local newsroom! I'm not paying to see this. I heard from real journalists on AI at #NICAR26 and there's LOTs going on.

item.title: Chris Ingraham (@cingraham.bsky.social)
item.description: I was at NICAR a year ago and the amount of AI *already being used,* even then, was eye-opening. It was mostly for the non-flashy stuff, data cleaning and analyzing, digging up nuggets of info in folders containing thousands of PDFs, etc.

item.title: Scott Klein (@kleinmatic.bsky.social)
item.description:
New pod! Live from the NICAR conference, we talk to @andreasuozzo.com and @fresques.bsky.social from ProPublica about their project "Life of a Mother."
Get a behind-the-scenes look at their work -- and some NICAR FOMO.
Available wherever you get your podcasts. podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/t...

item.title: J. Emory Parker 🏳️‍🌈 (@jaspar.bsky.social)
item.description: I’m not sold on the future of vibe coding. I’m sure some people will find success with that, but that’s not what I find interesting. Like last year at NICAR that’s what AI sessions felt like: fighting with a chatbot to maybe build the app you want.

item.title: Yolanda Estrada (@yolandaestrada.bsky.social)
item.description:
Si buscas calidad de verdad, tienes que pasar por #Chamartín
Carnicería NICAR (C. de Mauricio Legendre, 7) el producto habla por sí solo: género de primera y ese trato cercano q siempre se agradece
#RutaComerciosChamartín Chamartín, un distrito para vivirLO
#ChamartínVivo #comerciodeproximidad

item.title: (@distritochamartin.bsky.social)
item.description:
Si buscas calidad de verdad, tienes que pasar por #Chamartín 🥩✨
En Carnicería NICAR (C. de Mauricio Legendre, 7) el producto habla por sí solo: género de primera y ese trato cercano que siempre se agradece
#RutaComerciosChamartín Chamartín, un distrito para vivirLO

item.title: Global Investigative Journalism Network (@gijn.org)
item.description: Wrapping up our #TechFocus project, GIJN offers expert tips from journalists at the NICAR conference on how to report on the impact of the resource-hungry data storage facilities that power AI — from water exploitation to greenwashing to flouting environmental regulations.

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: “If you like podcasts and computer-assisted investigative journalism you might enjoy this podcast feed of audio recordings from the 2024, 2025, and 2026 NICAR conferences.” - @backspace.com github.com/bcks/nicar #NICAR26 #DDJ

item.title: Ken Schwencke (@schwanksta.com)
item.description: that was the hotel NICAR was at!

item.title: J. Emory Parker 🏳️‍🌈 (@jaspar.bsky.social)
item.description: I came away from this years NICAR with the clearest vision I’ve had so far for the future of AI and coding: these things are most useful when you use them to automate drudge work while leaving you free to focus on the actual engineering challenges

item.title: Reed F. Richardson (@reedfrich.bsky.social)
item.description: Fresh from the NICAR conference, @gijn.org global reporter Rowan Philp digs into the ominous rise of phone location-tracking systems, & how bad actors have weaponized them for surveillance on everyone from public officials to corporate execs to Hollywood actors—as well as investigative journalists.

item.title: Stephanie Lamm (@stephanielamm.bsky.social)
item.description: Some folks at #NICAR26 asked about my 9-1-1 hold times investigation, so I put together a tipsheet that lets you replicate this investigation anywhere in the country. This is a national issue, so I encourage everyone to look at how your local agencies are performing! github.com/stephanielam...

item.title: Organized Crime and Corruption Reporting Project (@occrp.org)
item.description: At NICAR data journalism conference, OCCRP's Ezana Ćeman led a workshop demonstrating how @aleph-pro.occrp.org can help journalists uncover and analyze complex data.

item.title: Allan James Vestal (@ajv.bsky.social)
item.description:
I feel lucky — I got to speak a few words of gratitude to Diana between sessions at the NICAR conference early this month.
It’s probably the most I ever spoke with her. But in retrospect I’m glad I got a chance to add my voice to the chorus of others who know all the good she’s made possible.

item.title: Steven Rich (@datab.ae)
item.description: i have many stories about Didi but i want to highlight my last one: after speaking publicly about my anorexia at NICAR two weeks ago, she pulled me aside and told me that she was pulling for me and that if there was anything she could do, she was there. to me, that moment was quintessential her.

item.title: GIJN em Português (@gijnportugues.bsky.social)
item.description:
👩🏾‍💻 Diversas novas ferramentas de reportagem foram lançadas na #NICAR26 e a GIJN estava lá!
Nesse artigo, oferecemos um resumo desses recursos — que podem auxiliar investigações com geolocalização, financiamento ilícito, dados de deportação e mais.

item.title: Emma Gallegos (@emmagallegos.bsky.social)

item.title: Investigate Midwest (@investigatemidwest.bsky.social)
item.description:
After logging every egg his hens produced and every dollar he spent, the data told an interesting story.
Watch his data-driven breakdown from a lightning talk at the @ire.org NICAR conference to see whether backyard chickens are actually cheaper than buying eggs at the store.

item.title: Global Investigative Journalism Network (@gijn.org)
item.description: Several new reporting tools dropped at #NICAR26 & GIJN was there to find out more 🔎 In our latest story, we offer a round-up of these resources—that can assist investigations with geolocation, collaboration, illicit finance, deportation data, and tracking bad actors online. https://twp.ai/E6HtUm

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: It was different attending the #NICAR26 data journalism conference this year now that I'm retired! And kind of strange not returning home to a newsroom. My latest #NextChapter post: nextchapter.machlis.com/posts/2026-0... #Retirement

item.title: Alex Garcia (@alexgarcia.xyz)
item.description:
Big thanks to everyone who came to my #NICAR26 session for libfec last week, it was a lot of fun! NICAR is the only place where you can chat about federal campaign finance data and actually enjoy it...
It wasn't recorded, but I made a video version of it here!
youtu.be/UdkQ5HEiF20

item.title: Mike Reilley (@mikereilley.bsky.social)
item.description: We have added more than 40 new resources to the Journalist's Toolbox this weekend, including many to the public documents and data tools pages from the #nicar26 conference:

item.description: Jeff Hargarten of the Minnesota Star Tribune is putting on a clinic on ICE data and deportation data at #nicar26. His Github page:

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: #NICAR26 is a wrap and what a conference it was. 900+ attendees | 325+ speakers | 225 sessions Shoutout to every data journalist and investigative reporter who showed up, shared knowledge and made Indianapolis feel like home for a few days. What did you learn? What stood out?

item.title: Jim Haddadin (@jimhaddadin.bsky.social)
item.description: Nerding out on new ideas after #NICAR26 in Indianapolis. Also: did you know the city has a whole network of indoor skywalks? You can travel blocks without stepping outside.

item.title: Matt Hodges (@matthodges.bsky.social)
item.description:
Hey this is fun, agent-fecfile¹ was featured in @akesslerdc.bsky.social's talk² at NICAR³ over the weekend.
¹ github.com/hodgesmr/agent-fecfile ² github.com/amkessler/ni... ³ schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

item.title: Mike Reilley (@mikereilley.bsky.social)
item.description: Interesting #nicar26 session: "Fact-Checking AI-Assisted Reporting in the Newsroom". A lot of talk about disclosures both internally and externally. We post disclosures on stories and AI policy on our principles page on

item.title: Daniel J. Willis (@bayareadata.press)
item.description:
Hey #NICAR26 attendees! Especially @newsguild.org members! Did you know that by buying coffee at the hotel Starbucks, the only coffee shop anywhere nearby during a massive rain storm, you crossed a picket line?
Atone by donating however much you spent to the @sbworkersunited.org strike fund!

item.title: MuckRock (@muckrock.com)
item.description: Editor Anna Massoglia joining our @westvirginiau.bsky.social collaborators for their #NICAR26 presentation on tracking opioid settlement funds. Learn more about this project: www.muckrock.com/news/archive...

item.title: Daniel J. Willis (@bayareadata.press)
item.description: I couldn’t get a flight without a stupid time or layover until today so, in case you were wondering what’s here after #NICAR26, it’s the exact opposite conference: Work Truck Week.

item.title: Tyler Dukes (@mtdukes.bsky.social)
item.description: One of the encouraging things about #NICAR26 was seeing this very full job board of news organizations (including McClatchy) looking to hire talented data-driven journalists.

item.title: brentajones.bsky.social (@brentajones.bsky.social)
item.description: After all the AI at #NICAR, one useful thing I found this morning is I tossed my sloppy session notes at it and said "make these consistently formatted, link links, search the NICAR schedule for the correct name of the session, and add speaker affiliations." Did pretty well.

item.title: Ben Welsh (@palewi.re)
item.description: 📚 I'm happy to release free, online textbooks covering the two courses I taught at the hashtag#NICAR26 data journalism conference put on by Investigative Reporters and Editors last week in Indianapolis.

item.title: Mike Reilley (@mikereilley.bsky.social)
item.description: The 2nd Edition of "Data + Journalism: A Story-Driven Approach to Data Reporting" will be out in August. New exercises, AI tools, training videos and many other goodies. You can pre-order this summer on www.routledge.com #nicar26

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: Dug up my notes and handout files from NICAR 2007, including how to scrape a website with Perl. 😅 #NICAR

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: For an actual R- and Python-specific coding agent, Positron Assistant has an Agent mode. You can choose from a couple of different model providers, but alas it's all pay-per-use API -- you can't use a $20 Claude or ChatGPT subscription. www.youtube.com/watch?v=9ZW2... FYI #NICAR26

item.title: Andrea Suozzo (@andreasuozzo.com)
item.description: What a whirlwind #nicar26 was. Sitting quietly in one place and knocking out the colorwork portion of this sock was a deeply satisfying way to pass the time on the flight(s) home.

item.title: Steven Rich (@datab.ae)
item.description: many folks at #nicar26 wanted to know if i was getting a tattoo at the conference this year and the answer is no. i got two.

item.title: OpenNews @ SRCCON in July (@opennews.bsky.social)
item.description:
We've got a ton of great session pitches already, but we're hungry for more and you need the extra time ... so let's make it happen. #NICAR26 folks, rejoice.
We're extending the first priority CFP deadline to March 11. Submit the form to pitch a session or request $500 in travel support!

item.title: sandra fish (@fishnette.bsky.social)
item.description: Thanks to all the @ire.org staff for another great #NICAR #NICAR26! Can’t wait to see folks next year in Denver!!

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: Hey R and Python folks at #NICAR26 looking at coding agents for data analysis: Databot from Posit (formerly RStudio) is another option. It's an assistant for the Positron IDE specifically designed for data work. See a demo from September's Posit conference: youtu.be/Ve7cNChzq5Q?... #RStats #Python

item.title: Josh Hinkle (@hinklej.bsky.social)
item.description: Thank you to the 900 #NICAR26 attendees, the @ire.org staff and all the talented journalists who volunteered their time and skills this week! It was my first conference as IRE Board President, and I’m so honored to serve such a wonderful organization at such an important time for our industry.

item.title: Josh Hinkle (@hinklej.bsky.social)
item.description: When one visits Indy, one mustn’t miss @susanbatt.bsky.social! So good to see you at #NICAR26, my friend! Always inspired by your work and leadership! ❤️ @ire.org

item.title: Josh Hinkle (@hinklej.bsky.social)
item.description: Enjoyed an evening of Indianapolis jazz with @ire.org Executive Director @ddfonline.bsky.social during #NICAR26! 🎶🎷🎹🥁🔔🎻

item.title: Josh Hinkle (@hinklej.bsky.social)
item.description: Can’t thank the @ire.org staff enough for all their hard work at #NICAR26 and their dedication to our members! Appreciate you all! ☺️

item.title: Josh Hinkle (@hinklej.bsky.social)
item.description: It wouldn’t be #NICAR26 without a Cool Kids 😎 night out! Love these friends and fellow @ire.org members!

item.title: Murphy Woodhouse (@murphywoodhouse.bsky.social)
item.description: Great #nicar26, a heartfelt thanks to @ire.org! The vibes were top notch

item.title: Josh Hinkle (@hinklej.bsky.social)
item.description: Hanging with the some of the @ire.org Board members who attended #NICAR26! Love working with this group! 😊

item.title: Tyler Machado (@tylermachado.com)
item.description: #nicar26 I think it’s been 10 years or so since my first NICAR, so it’s appropriate that my hotel bar DJ is playing Chance the Rapper rn. very thankful for everything I’ve learned and everyone I’ve met then and now and, on average, every other year between. 🫡

item.title: Jon Keegan (@jonkeegan.com)
item.description: Fun time in Indianapolis this week for #nicar26

item.title: Daniel J. Willis (@bayareadata.press)
item.description:
In case anyone at #NICAR26 was wondering, the “JW” in JW Marriott is after the founder, J. Willard Marriott.
Also, in case you were wondering, the J stands for John. He could have been John W. Marriott but instead opted for J. Willard. The past, man.

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: Semantra is an open-source tool for searching documents by meaning, not keywords. It aims "to make running a specialized semantic search engine easy, friendly, configurable, and private/secure." Developed by @dylanfreedman.nytimes.com github.com/freedmand/se... (Needs #Python installed) #NICAR26

item.title: Ethan Corey (@ethanscorey.bsky.social)
item.description: I had the pleasure of running a hands-on workshop on fact-checking data stories at #NICAR26 today, where we had lots of fun diagnosing errors in data analysis. For those who couldn't make it, check out the Google Colab notebook here: colab.research.google.com/drive/1NrbfS...

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: It was so interesting to hear at #NICAR26 how different newsrooms are - and aren't - using AI. The NY Times looks to have a very well thought out approach, always making sure human experts start and review any AI work. (And they have some amazing internal tools) #GenAI

item.title: Rob Wells (@robwells.bsky.social)
item.description:
Here's the repo for my computational text analysis talks at #nicar2026
Thanks to the brave souls who attended!
github.com/profrobwells...

item.title: Steven Rich (@datab.ae)
item.description: the response from so many folks from all corners of #nicar26 has been so amazingly heartening. i feel so so loved and supported. i simply love being a part of this community.

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description: On that note, I will miss you all, my fellow #NICAR nerds. Except you Boston #NICAR nerds. We have coffee dates ahead of us.

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description: I’m so tired, but #NICAR is my absolute favorite journalism conference. At no other journalism conference would everyone cheer for a spreadsheet about backyard chickens — or a spreadsheet of any kind. These are my people.

item.title: Karen K. Ho (@karenho.bsky.social)
item.description: This AP report also makes me glad I did not attend #NICAR26 this week. I really miss my friends! I miss writing funny Google Slides plus teaching and helping others. I do not miss worrying about US immigration or if I should be using a burner phone.

item.title: Lisa Pickoff-White (@pickoffwhite.bsky.social)
item.description: How friction can be good keeps coming up at #NICAR26. Running into the weird cases gets you to understand the data better. It can force you to ask the right questions.

item.title: Kevin Uhrmacher (@kevinuhrm.bsky.social)
item.description: Enjoyed talking about making public data *actually public* at #NICAR26. Here's the link to our slides if interested docs.google.com/presentation...

item.title: Josh Hinkle (@hinklej.bsky.social)
item.description: Loved teaching this master class on “Managing Investigators” at #NICAR26 with these two amazing people - @ecg.bsky.social and @justinmyers.net! Thanks to everyone who registered and attended! Look for our 10th session of this class at the @ire.org Conference this summer!

item.title: Steven Rich (@datab.ae)
item.description:
over the years, I have been blessed to do seven(!) lightning talks at NICAR. if you're interested in them, i have kept all of the slide decks in one place over the years. the topics are all over the spectrum. #NICAR26
bit.ly/stevenslightning

item.title: Clare Spencer (@clarespencer.bsky.social)
item.description: The problem with getting AI to write for you: “Now you don’t get to do the thing that you enjoy”. sachnishal.bsky.social #nicar2026

item.title: Josh Hinkle (@hinklej.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy to help host the #LGBTQ+ networking session at #NICAR26 with these wonderful @ire.org staff members! 🌈❤️

item.title: Josh Hinkle (@hinklej.bsky.social)
item.description: Had a great time at #NICAR26 meeting with my mentee, getting to know our JOC fellows and welcoming conference first-timers with @ire.org Executive Director @ddfonline.bsky.social!

item.title: Leah Becerra (@leahbecerra.com)
item.description: We are almost out of @newsmediahelpdesk.org swag at #NICAR26. Seriously, this is all that’s left!

item.title: Josh Hinkle (@hinklej.bsky.social)
item.description: So great to see so many @ire.org friends at #NICAR26! ❤️

item.title: Citizai (@citiz.ai)
item.description: Join experts at NICAR26 to learn about campaign data impact on politics and citizens. Stay informed about money in politics. bsky.app/profile/open...

item.title: OpenSecrets.org (@opensecrets.org)
item.description: If you are attending NICAR26 this weekend, make sure you go to the OpenSecrets session Sunday morning. Brendan Glavin, our director of insights and one of the nations's preeminent experts on money in politics, will lead a hands-on session on how to cover campaign data. #NICAR26

item.description: I’m so proud of this work, and so impressed by all the other exceptional Phil Meyer award winners! #nicar26

item.title: Steven Rich (@datab.ae)
item.description: i just told the whole of #NICAR26 about something i’ve been a bit guarded on speaking about publicly and i want to share it with you all as well. a couple months ago, i was diagnosed with anorexia nervosa. i’ve been in recovery ever since, but every day has been a battle.

item.title: Daniel J. Willis (@bayareadata.press)
item.description:
Hey, anyone in #NICAR leadership following any of the hashtags? #NICAR26, #NICAR2026, #INDYNICAR? @ire.org? I have a question:
The slide said attendees from 48 states, territories, and DC. I assume that means DC (obviously) and Puerto Rico are represented. So which four states didn’t send anyone?

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: #NICAR26 Lightning Talks are happening at 5 p.m. at the White River E-F room on Level 1. Listen to people share a piece of advice or teach a new skill in just 5 minutes! You don't want to miss this!

item.title: Derek Willis (@dwillis.bsky.social)

item.title: Julia Haslanger (@juliajrh.bsky.social)
item.description: Excited to give a lightning talk soon at #NICAR26 on how to make any chart go up and to the right. It's a little bit silly, like many lightning talks.

item.title: Juan Pablo Garnham (@jpgarnham.bsky.social)
item.description: Back from #NICAR26 feeling energized! Thanks to @ire.org for having the @evictionlab.bsky.social back. And big shoutout to @outliermedia.org’s @amondry.bsky.social for sharing his experience in Detroit. Want the slides or tipsheet? Reply below, and I’ll send them.

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: While I've been at #GenAI talks at #Nicar26: "GPT-5.4 is now available," OpenAI announced. "It completes complex tasks with less back-and-forth while using significantly fewer tokens than GPT-5.2." New prompt guide: developers.openai.com/api/docs/gui...

item.title: Daniel J. Willis (@bayareadata.press)
item.description: There are quite a few LLM sessions at #NICAR26 as you might imagine, some good some not, and they’ve clarified what bothers me: chatbots are AI in the same way 2015 hoverboards were Back to the Future hoverboards. The branding makes promises the tech can’t keep but in this case it’s not as obvious.

item.title: Emily Hopkins reporting for Mirror Indy (@emilyhopkins.bsky.social)
item.description:
If you're staying at the #NICAR26 conference hotel, you might be able to see a vacant plot of land a few blocks away. That's the site of Indy's first public burial ground, and it's been through some stuff.
Here's the backstory:
mirrorindy.org/greenlawn-ce...

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: It's nice to be someplace without 3 feet of snow piled up everywhere! Not to mention taking a lunchtime walk without a coat. ☀️ Current temperature: 73F/23C #Nicar26 #Indianapolis

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Need lunch plans at #NICAR26? Today’s food truck is All American Grub. Order ahead, explore the conference, then grab your food when you’re ready. Opens today at Noon until 2:30 p.m. 📍 Level 1: near Ballroom F Check out the menu + order here: https://bit.ly/3OS2J0M

item.title: Jon Keegan (@jonkeegan.com)

Believe me, he is! www.bloomberg.com/features/202... #nicar26

item.title: Leah Becerra (@leahbecerra.com)
item.description: Visit the exhibitors area of #NICAR26 to chat with me about @newsmediahelpdesk.org! We're here to help local news. Pick up some swag and let me know if you have a story we should publish about a tool or strategy that's working in your newsroom ✨

item.title: Aaron Mendelson (@amendelson.bsky.social)
item.description:
Big day at #NICAR26!

Swing by in if you're in Indy schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#... schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

item.description: On seeking data about immigration enforcement in the US: "Every records request should start with reporting", Will Craft from the Guardian tells #NICAR26. Know what you should ask for, he advised. "You have to be very very very precise." In other words: Do a lot of work prior to filing a FOIA.

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: Interesting takeaway via Duy Nguyen [NY TImes]: Various AI-based tools have different places in the journalism process. For ex. chatbots can be useful to get started and find story ideas; AI-powered semantic search is better if you have subject expertise & more targeted questions #NICAR26 #GenAI

#NICAR26 #NICAR2026

item.title: Chris Cioffi (@reportercioffi.bsky.social)
item.description: LDA news: Excited to lead my first #NICAR26 session today on LobbyR, an R package I developed that turns federal lobbying disclosures into structured data. It’s a lot easier with than using the site! Check it out on CRAN: cran.r-project.org/package=lobbyR schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Each day at #NICAR26, we’ll have a different food truck on site and they’ll be fully covered from the rain. Here’s how to find it: Head to the first floor, find Ballroom F, and follow the food truck signs. They’ll lead you straight to the exit door that takes you outside to lunch.

We’re discussing the Police Records Access Project at #NICAR26:
Thursday: Challenges with cross-domain collaboration, 3:45 Monitoring police accountability laws across the U.S. 5 Friday: Utilizing new police misconduct and employment databases, 9 Saturday: How to use AI responsibly, 2:30

item.title: Ben Welsh (@palewi.re)
item.description: The site, which launched today at #NICAR26, is powered by semantic search technology. That means it will use AI to match results based on the meaning of your words, not just exact keyword hits.

Usually quite amor of good tutorials and tips are shared via the hashtag #nicar26, and some session recordings surface later online
#datascience

I'll be at #NICAR26 this weekend, speaking at the sessions:
"Introduction to network visualization and analysis" Thursday @ 2:30pm "How to investigate Telegram" Friday @ 10:15am "Using open-source intelligence (OSINT) in investigations" Saturday @ 10:15am
DM me if you want to meet up!

item.title: Andrea Suozzo (@andreasuozzo.com)
item.description:
Hey #NICAR26: Have you ever wanted to report on maternal or infant health but weren't sure where to start?
Tomorrow at 10:15am, @sophiechou.bsky.social, @hollyhacker.bsky.social and I will run you through tons of story examples and dataset ideas that we hope will spark your next story!

item.title: Steven Rich (@datab.ae)
item.description: and session 3 is lightning talks! at 5:15 on Friday. I’ll be speaking about how while using data has made my career, it has nearly killed me. And yes, I mean that literally. #NICAR26

item.description: session 2 is on Friday at 3:45pm on the art of the data FOIA. #NICAR26

item.title: Steven Rich (@datab.ae)
item.description: I am en route to Indianapolis for #NICAR26 and am so excited to connect with all the nerds. I’m speaking at three sessions this year and I hope of you’re in attendance, you’ll consider joining me at them.

📊

(Stories in thread)

item.description:
Really looking forward to attending this week’s @ire.org NICAR conference in Indianapolis! 🏎️🏁
I’ll be doing a panel with Libby Seline and Ryan Serpico where we dive into some of the AI concepts that journalists should know, and share some tips for reporting on AI. schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

item.title: Emilia Ruzicka (@emiliaruzicka.bsky.social)
item.description: This is a great way to make sure your social posts are accessible! And if you don’t know how to write alt text, join @stacykess.bsky.social and I for our “Implementing Accessibility” session at #NICAR26 on Friday!

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Can data storytelling reach audiences who distrust established science? In this #NICAR26 session, panelists share innovative approaches to presenting data in ways that engage, persuade and build trust. With: Eva Constantaras, Aaron Mendelson, Max Siegelbaum, Ariana Beedie

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Attend the "State secrets: a workflow for using state-level ethics disclosure data in your reporting" session at #NICAR26. Journalists Audrey Nielsen and Diara Townes will demo two states’ systems, share collaborative datasets + a 2026 tipsheet.

item.title: Patrick Garvin (@patrickmgarvin.bsky.social)
item.description:
This week, @ire.org has its annual NICAR conference. If you struggle to remember to add alt text to your images, Bluesky has a setting that will remind you. Go to "Settings," then "Accessibility." Select the checkbox for "Require alt text before posting."
#NICAR26 #NICAR2026

item.title: Derek Willis (@dwillis.bsky.social)
item.description:
If you're coming to #NICAR2026 this week, I've got a few sessions for you:
* Demoing the new IRE Resources Center with @palewi.re (Thu) * Using LLMs to improve your archives (Sat) * Tips for election coverage (Sat)
Will also be at the NICAR-L session on Sunday morning with some work.
Come along!

Stop by, say hi and bring your questions! schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

item.title: Christian McDonald (@crit.bsky.social)
item.description: I'm headed to #NICAR26 this week with a bunch of @innovationut.bsky.social students so we can learn about more tools and stories to tell using data and other tech. So ... I may do more posting than ... well, almost none. We gonna get nerdy.

item.title: Dan Bauman (@danbauman77.bsky.social)
item.description:
SOME PERSONAL NEWS: I’m on the journalism job market again! (More below)
From business, ed, legal, breaking & investigative reporting, to data & research skills rooted in Python, R & AI — I can deliver for your newsroom. Email me at danbauman77@gmail.com & I’ll see u @ #NICAR (1/10)

item.title: Aaron Mendelson (@amendelson.bsky.social)
item.description:
If you'll be at #NICAR26 in Indy, I'm doing a few sessions.
3/5 (Thurs) @ 11:30: Using data to find sources 3/6 (Fri) @ 10:15: Demo: The Gun Violence Data Hub 3/6 (Fri) @ 11:30: Connect with skeptical and disengaged audiences ... with data!
Hope to see ya there! schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Ready to level up your election data analysis skills? Join this hands-on #NICAR26 session designed for journalists and data pros who want faster, cleaner workflows. You’ll learn through real-world data journalism examples from Eade Hemingway and Oliver Hawkins of the Financial Times.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: When should journalists use AI and when shouldn’t we? The #NICAR26 panel “How to Use AI Responsibly” brings together newsroom leaders to discuss ethics, disclosure and combining AI tools with human review.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Complex PDFs slowing you down? “How to Get Data Out of Complex PDFs Using AI” is a hands-on session at #NICAR26 on extracting key info and vetting AI outputs to power strong reporting. With: Disha Raychaudhuri (Reuters) Duy Nguyen (The New York Times) Clare Farley (Reuters)

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)

Are you excited? We're excited.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: In this hands-on #NICAR26 session, you’ll learn how to run large language models like Llama, Mistral, and Gemma. This session is perfect for beginners. Led by Aarushi Sahejpal from American University and Dhrumil Mehta from Columbia University. Register for #NICAR26: https://bit.ly/4oDxQJH

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Want to build a dynamic, data-driven voter guide for your local elections? At this hands-on #NICAR26 session, Adam Marton and Jerry Zremski from the University of Maryland will show you how the Local News Network creates its signature online voter guides using SvelteKit + Datasette.

item.title: Equal Access Public Media (EAPM) (@equalaccesspublicmedia.org)

item.title: News Media Help Desk (@newsmediahelpdesk.org)
item.description: The Help Desk will be at #NICAR26 in Indianapolis! Find us in the exhibitor area, where you can pick up swag, tell us about what’s working for your news organization or tell us about a challenge your newsroom is facing. https://www.ire.org/training/conferences/nicar-2026/

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Immigration data can feel overwhelming. At #NICAR26, “Using Immigration Data to Tell Stories in Your Community” breaks it down and shows you how to turn messy data into meaningful local stories. Come ready to dig in.

(4/4)

item.title: Emilia Ruzicka (@emiliaruzicka.bsky.social)
item.description: I am impossibly excited to be speaking at #NICAR26 in Indianapolis! On Friday, I’ll be kicking things off with @stacykess.bsky.social and @patrickmgarvin.bsky.social for “Accessibility Basics.” We’ll give you a crash course in implementing more accessible practices in your own newsroom! (1/4)

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Are you going #NICAR26? Attend "Fun with Hypotheticals: Investigating Your Dubious Data Dilemmas in Real Time". Bring your silliest data question and watch journalists break down how they’d actually report it using real investigative methods. Submit your hypothetical: https://bit.ly/4qTpUoE

For a #NICAR26 #RStats workshop by @mattwaite.bsky.social

item.title: Tyler Machado (@tylermachado.com)
item.description: I'll be at #NICAR26 next week, and I am so excited to once again to be leading the "Building your first SvelteKit data app" hands-on demo. Now with more Svelte 5. But the same number of cats.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Meet the #NICAR26 Fellows! Sotiris Sideris is an investigative data journalist and educator from Athens, Greece, and a Nieman Fellow at Harvard based in Cambridge, Massachusetts. He's looking forward to learning how journalists are actually applying AI in real-world investigative reporting.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Meet the #NICAR26 Fellows! Bella Davis is an Indigenous affairs reporter at New Mexico In Depth and a proud Yurok tribal member based in Albuquerque. Her reporting focuses on critical issues affecting Native communities across New Mexico.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Meet the #NICAR26 Fellows! Jordan Gass-Pooré @jgasspoore.bsky.social is a podcast producer & investigative journalist based in NYC She is looking forward to sharpening her skills in incorporating data into audio investigations & analyzing global environmental datasets for local reporting.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Meet #NICAR26 Fellow Silvia Canelón, a data scientist and journalist based in Philadelphia. She is hoping to bring back accountability story ideas for Philly and sharpen her ability to create custom interactive data visualizations. Meet the rest of the #NICAR26 Fellows: https://bit.ly/4cAtujW

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Meet your #NICAR26 Fellows! Stacy Kess, Chief of Editorial at Equal Access Public Media, is gearing up for #NICAR26 the only way she knows how: with coffee. Lots of it. Catch Stacy and her coffee-fueled data brilliance at #NICAR26!

item.description: Anyone going to #NICAR26 in Indy next week: Swing by my Thursday 9 a.m. session, "AI Tools for Journalists". We'll focus on data and other multimedia tools. Two-hour, hands-on session. Good fun. Tools, exercises to take with you. Good fun.

item.title: Lucia Walinchus (@walinchus.bsky.social)
item.description:
4/8 Next, pull in the schedule:
NICAR2026 <- rio::import("https://ire-nicar-conference-schedules.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/nicar-2026/nicar-2026-schedule.json")
Make a dataframe of all the speakers:
speakers <- NICAR2026$speakers
And get their socials:
socials <- speakers$social

item.title: Lucia Walinchus (@walinchus.bsky.social)
item.description:

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: We’re proud to share that IRE is sponsoring 19 fellowships for journalists attending #NICAR26 in Indianapolis on March 5–8. All fellows meet IRE’s membership standards, engaging substantially in news gathering, production, research or journalism education. Read more here: https://bit.ly/4cAtujW

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: #NICAR26 has several pre-registration workshops that go deep into data analysis, coding, scraping and investigative techniques. Register now and secure your seat: https://www.ire.org/training/conferences/nicar-2026/

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description:
But wait, #NICAR26! There's more! After Accessibility Basics is the all new Implementing Accessibility hands-on session. Great for: • learning how to write alt text. • a refresher on how to use alt text. • practicing your alt text chops. • scoring goodies.
schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#... 2/

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description:
With @ire.org #NICAR26 on the brain (because I'm putting the polishing touch on the presentations), I want to remind you that you definitely want to be there for Accessibility Basics. Come for the data, stay for the digital accessibility-Star Wars tie-in.
schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...
1/

item.title: Ben Welsh (@palewi.re)
item.description:
🤓 Coming to #NICAR26? Looking for things to do?
Join Scott Klein and me for a free dinner on Wed. night! OpenNews is hosting a discussion of our recent story on the state of open-source in journalism.
The full menu of community meals is at […]

item.title: Tara Puckey (@tpuckey.bsky.social)
item.description: Really looking forward to speaking at @ire.org's NICAR Conference next month. We'll be talking about better teams (my favorite) and generally working better with other humans (necessary, IMO). 👯 Relationships are the most important piece Will I see you there?

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description:
Heading to Indy for #NICAR26?
Sign up for a 20-min one-on-one session with a manager or newsroom leader with expertise.
#NICAR26 Office Hours will be held on Saturday, March 7 from 10:15-12:30 PM ET in Room 208: https://bit.ly/3MsiZEP
Sign up before Feb. 20.

item.title: Oli Hawkins (@olihawkins.com)
item.description:
If you're a data journalist using Python and you are going to be at NICAR, we are running an introduction to Polars workshop.
schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#... bsky.app/profile/emil...

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: If you’re joining us for #NICAR26 in March and hoping to get (or give!) one-on-one guidance, the deadline to sign up for the mentorship program is TODAY, Friday, Feb. 13 at 11:59 P.M. ET. It's one of the most meaningful parts of the conference. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/4rJjGZc

item.title: Karen K. Ho (@karenho.bsky.social)
item.description: My hesitancy to attend NICAR in Minneapolis next month is part of a wider trend of Canadians avoiding travel the US for multiple years: www.usatoday.com/story/travel...

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description:
Hey #NICAR26! We're putting together a hands-on session you all know you want and need called Implementing Accessibility.
It focuses on Alt Text best practices, and how to do it for photos, graphics, maps, and more. We'll give you practice plus some goodies!
#AltText @ire.org

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description:
Are you heading to @ire.org #NICAR26? Looking for a job? Sign up for a 1-on-1 feedback or career advice session with a manager!
Bring your resume, a clip, or a career question and we'll match you with an expert. (Possibly me.)
Sign up: forms.gle/o2mCuhWvBa4R.... We have about 50 slots left!

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description:
March is conference month!
I'll be talking about #AccessibilityBasics and teaching how to implement #Accessibility at @ire.org's #NICAR26 in Indy. Then I'll head to Detroit to talk about #AccessibleCommuniction at #NTC26 (Nonprofit Tech Conference), representing @equalaccesspublicmedia.org.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description:
It's now time to vote for your favorite #NICAR26 t-shirt designs! You have until 11:59 p.m. on Feb. 13 to vote.
Click here to vote: https://bit.ly/4cli8A8

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Voting for #NICAR26 Lightning Talks is now open! Lightning Talks are fast, 5-minute presentations focused on practical skills, tools and techniques. Voting is open now and closes Feb. 20. The selected talks will be presented Friday, March 6 at #NICAR26. Have your say: https://bit.ly/4qrmZDa

item.title: Emilia Ruzicka (@emiliaruzicka.bsky.social)
item.description: Can’t wait to join @stacykess.bsky.social and @patrickmgarvin.bsky.social to present #AccessibilityBasics and #ImplementingAccessibility at #NICAR26! If you’ll be there, come join us!!

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description:
By the way, NICAR is my favorite journalism conference of the year.
And it's not just all the data nerds and free coffee.
I swear.
(But the free coffee and being around a bunch of people who totally get me helps.)

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description: It is less than a month until #NICAR26, and I'm headed back to Indianapolis to teach #AccessibilityBasics with my two favorite people @emiliaruzicka.bsky.social and @patrickmgarvin.bsky.social. But wait! There's more! Stick around for the new hands-on #ImplementingAccessibility session!

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: Have questions about NICAR26 or other upcoming IRE events? Join IRE President @hinklej.bsky.social, Executive Director @ddfonline.bsky.social and Training Director Laura Moscoso for virtual office hours this Wednesday, Feb. 11 at 1 PM ET. Register now: https://bit.ly/4kq5aDl

item.title: The Word (@the-word.news)
item.description:
Reporter Hashim Quraishi is preparing a big preview of #NICAR26.
And Akinyele Michael will have some great columns in store for you!
If you have news to send us for the March edition, or you know a source (or a source) for one of these articles, email editor@the-word.news.
3/

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description:
IRE Board President @hinklej.bsky.social explains why IRE’s 2026 conference season is so critical — and how NICAR26 (March 5–8 in Indianapolis) will help journalists sharpen their reporting, storytelling and data skills.
Learn more and sign up: https://bit.ly/4oDxQJH

item.title: Ben Welsh (@palewi.re)
item.description:
Want to talk more about it? If you're attending the upcoming #NICAR26 conference in Indianapolis, you should join us for the OpenNews dinner we're sponsoring.
More details soon. DM me if you want in.

item.title: Diana Fuentes (@ddfonline.bsky.social)
item.description: Your concerns are real, of course, Karen. There are no easy answers for safety issues. We do have lower rates for NICAR26 for unemployed members; email info@ire.org for details. If you can’t attend NICAR26, I hope you’ll consider attending AccessFest in October; same great training, all online.

item.title: Sharon Machlis (@smachlis.bsky.social)
item.description: Conference app chatbot built in R that: - Answers schedule questions - Includes both chatbot and searchable table - One-click button filters table to see only sessions AI bot mentions Code: github.com/smach/NICAR2... App: smach-nicar2026-chatbot.share.connect.posit.cloud #RStats #RShiny #NICAR26

item.title: Diana Fuentes (@ddfonline.bsky.social)
item.description: Sorry for delay in replying, Karen. And about your situation. I wish everyone could be @NICAR26. It’s our homecoming; IRE’s first confab was in Indy in 1976. Like now, journalists were under attack. It’s so much worse. But we can’t let them stop us from holding the powerful to account.

item.title: Investigative Reporters & Editors (@ire.org)
item.description: ⚡ DEADLINE ALERT ⚡ Submit your #NICAR26 Lightning Talk pitch by tonight at 11:59 p.m. ET (Feb. 8): https://bit.ly/4kpI53I 5-minute talks • anonymous submissions • attendee voting Voting opens Feb. 9. Talks take place March 6 at #NICAR26 in Indianapolis. Pitch it while you still can.

item.description: Headed to #NICAR26 next month in Indy? Know a news leader who could use this specialized, FREE training? item.title: Sophie Chou (@sophiechou.bsky.social)
item.description: Proud to share that @andreasuozzo.com and I received second place in @ire.org’s Philip Meyer Award for our data reporting in “Life of the Mother,” which quantified the impact of Texas’s abortion ban on pregnancy loss ❤️💔 we will be at #nicar26 next month hosting a panel on maternal health reporting!

item.title: Stacy Kess. -30- (@stacykess.bsky.social)
item.description:
I'm leading an Accessibility Basics (sort of an Accessibility Basics II, if you will) panel in March for @ire.org #NICAR26. With it leaning ever more into movie references, one thing is for certain.
I need a pyrotechnics display to pull this whole thing off properly.
Just saying...
